title: Project Sections and Workflow
description: Implement project sections (working copies from templates) with full CRUD and workflow status transitions (draft > in-review > approved > locked, with send-back-to-draft). API includes PATCH endpoint for status transitions that records approver and timestamp. Frontend shows section list within project detail, section detail with workflow action buttons, and markdown rendering.
designContext: Entity: Section with fields id, projectId, templateId, name, content, status (enum: draft, in-review, approved, locked), approvedBy, approvedAt, order, createdAt. POST /api/v1/sections creates a working copy by copying template content. PATCH /api/v1/sections/:id/status accepts {status, approvedBy} and enforces valid transitions. Locked sections cannot be edited. UI shows workflow action buttons contextually based on current status.
